Home / Services / Wood Fence Installation

Wood Fence Installation

Classic wood fences offering privacy and natural beauty to Chicago homes.

We specialize in crafting durable and aesthetically pleasing wood fences that complement the architectural style of Chicago homes. From traditional picket fences to privacy fences, we offer a wide range of wood types and styles to suit your needs. Our experienced team ensures proper installation, considering Chicago's harsh weather conditions, including deep frost lines and strong winds. We use pressure-treated lumber and quality hardware to maximize longevity and minimize maintenance. Whether you're looking to enhance your property's curb appeal or create a secure backyard oasis, our wood fence installation services provide the perfect solution. We handle everything from permits to post-installation cleanup, ensuring a hassle-free experience for our customers. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and customer satisfaction makes us the preferred choice for wood fence installation in Chicago and the surrounding suburbs. We can also custom-build gates to match your fence style and provide convenient access to your property. We understand the unique challenges of building fences in Chicago, and we're prepared to handle any obstacles that may arise.

Our Process

  1. 01 Consultation and Design: We discuss your needs and design a custom wood fence.
  2. 02 Material Selection: We help you choose the right wood and hardware.
  3. 03 Installation: Our skilled team installs your fence with precision.
  4. 04 Cleanup: We leave your property clean and tidy.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Privacy
  • Improved Curb Appeal
  • Increased Property Value
  • Natural Beauty

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of wood is best for Chicago's climate?

Pressure-treated lumber, cedar, and redwood are excellent choices due to their resistance to rot and insects. We can advise you on the best option for your budget and aesthetic preferences.

How long will a wood fence last in Chicago?

With proper installation and maintenance, a wood fence can last 15-20 years or more.

Do I need a permit to build a wood fence in Chicago?

Yes, in most cases, a permit is required. We can handle the permit application process for you.

Get a Free Estimate
